title: Eggplant Tibs
description: A spicy Ethiopian-inspired stir-fry of eggplant and onions, served with a side of tangy flatbread.
instructions: Heat ghee or oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook for another 5-7 minutes, until it's tender and lightly browned.
Add the tibs spice blend, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for another 1-2 minutes, until the eggplant is well coated with the spice blend.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the eggplant tibs hot, garnished with chopped cilantro if desired.
